title: [Codex CLI] Full Code Review Workflow: Read, Analyze, Report
description: Use Codex CLI to perform a complete code review on a sample codebase — identify issues, explain them, and generate a structured report.

steps.title: Install Codex CLI
steps.instruction: Install Codex CLI and verify it works with your OpenAI API key.
steps.prompt: How do I install Codex CLI and configure it with my OpenAI API key?
steps.expected_result: Codex CLI installed and responding to commands in your terminal

steps.title: Review a single file
steps.instruction: Run a code review on a JavaScript or Python file in your project.
steps.prompt: Review this file for bugs, security issues, and code quality improvements. Give me a numbered list of findings, each with: severity (Critical/High/Medium/Low), description, and suggested fix.
steps.expected_result: A numbered list of findings with severity ratings and suggested fixes
steps.tip: Start with a small file (under 200 lines) for your first review

steps.title: Generate a full review report
steps.instruction: Generate a structured markdown review report for the entire pull request.
steps.prompt: Read all changed files in this PR diff. Generate a code review report in markdown format with sections: Summary, Critical Issues, Improvements, Positive Observations. Output only the markdown.
steps.expected_result: A complete markdown code review report ready to share with your team
steps.tip: Save the output with `> code_review.md` for sharing

challenge.title: Complete the TODO counter
challenge.description: Write the missing line so the function counts TODO comments in a code string, ignoring letter case.

testCases.input: count_todos('# TODO: fix bug\n# TODO: add test')

hints: Python strings have a built-in count method.

videos.title: Codex CLI Code Review Workflow
videos.search_keyword: Codex CLI code review workflow tutorial 2026

evaluation.prompt: Paste your review output, markdown report, or terminal result here and AI will evaluate the quality of your Codex CLI review workflow.
evaluation.context: This lab teaches a full Codex CLI code review workflow: install, review a file, then generate a structured report.
successCriteria: The learner produced actual review findings
The final report is structured and actionable
commonMistakes: Only summarizing the file without concrete findings
Missing severity levels or suggested fixes
Generating a report before validating single-file review quality
